codeReview.summary: The commit improves some locale coverage, but it does not fully satisfy the Preferences live-switch scope. The Preferences viewport title is wired to the About label, active Providers/API Keys/Advanced viewport renderers still leave representative control text hardcoded, and part of the claimed Providers-tab migration landed in legacy helpers instead of the live viewport path.

issues.description: The Preferences viewport title now uses `LocaleKey::AboutTitle`, which resolves to `About CodexBar` / `关于 CodexBar` (`rust/src/locale.rs:426` and `rust/src/locale.rs:641`). That makes the Preferences window show the About title instead of a settings/preferences title, so the feature regresses the visible window title rather than correctly localizing it.

The live Providers-tab path still renders hardcoded strings in `render_provider_detail_panel` (`Not logged in`, `State`, `Source`, `Usage` at lines 2645-2692), while the localized provider-detail edits were made in the older `draw_provider_detail_panel` helper around lines 832-1072. `render_settings_ui` routes the active Providers tab through `render_providers_tab_macos` into this live renderer (lines 2223-2499), so the committed provider-pane migration does not reach the actual Preferences viewport.

Representative control-level strings in the active viewport remain hardcoded even though matching locale keys were added in `rust/src/locale.rs`: the API Keys tab still shows `✓ Set`, `+ 添加密钥`, `Remove`, `Get key →`, `Save`, and `Cancel` at lines 4077-4267, and the Advanced/shortcut area still hardcodes `Stable`/`Beta`, `Saved (restart to apply)`, `Invalid shortcut format`, and the shortcut help copy at lines 3692-3806. Because these controls are part of the already-open Preferences viewport, a language switch will still leave mixed-language UI and falls short of the representative control-level coverage required for `VAL-I18N-004`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission state is inconsistent about whether this feature is only groundwork. The worker transcript says the feature's `fulfills` array is empty and therefore skips live-switch-oriented scope, but the mission feature entry actually fulfills `VAL-I18N-004`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript artifact `/home/fsos/.factory/artifacts/tool-outputs/grep_tool_cli-call_NgbbGhwU5TvERQsA85CUWeNM-92651267.log` states "The `fulfills` array should be empty for this feature"; mission `features.json` lines 402-408 show `"fulfills": ["VAL-I18N-004"]` for `pr14-preferences-live-switch`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The active Preferences rendering path is not documented clearly enough: `preferences.rs` contains both older `show_*`/`draw_*` helpers and the live viewport `render_*` functions, and workers can easily edit the wrong path.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript focused on `draw_provider_detail_panel`, `draw_browser_cookie_import`, and `show_display_tab` in the 800-1200 line range, while the live viewport route is `render_settings_ui` -> `render_providers_tab_macos` / `render_provider_detail_panel` / `render_*` at lines 2096 onward.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `preferences-localization-worker` skill says `tdd` and `verification-before-completion` are required, but this session did not invoke either skill and did not add failing tests first.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript artifact shows `Tool: Skill` entries for `mission-worker-base` and `preferences-localization-worker`, and a grep for `tdd` / `verification-before-completion` in `/home/fsos/.factory/artifacts/tool-outputs/grep_tool_cli-call_5mdPGvuAWyCR9SNJ4QOKDjkl-92510335.log` returned no matches. The handoff also reports only an existing locale test rather than a new failing test-first addition.

summary: Reviewed commit `013aab485423384ba15920d07abfa3ad423acc19` and the worker transcript for `pr14-preferences-live-switch`. The feature should not pass scrutiny: it localizes some strings, but it wires the Preferences window title to the About label, leaves representative active viewport controls untranslated, and misses the live Providers renderer while claiming that pane was migrated.
